# query_feature_window_tr { #natural_features.query_feature_window_tr }

```python
query_feature_window_tr(
    feature,
    grid,
    *,
    run_index,
    t_start_s,
    t_end_s,
    relative_to_run=True,
    method='mean',
    output_time='absolute',
)
```

Slice a feature window and sample on the run TR grid.
